description: Client proposal: problem, approach, scope, team, investment, why-us.

fields.name: problem_statement
fields.example: Haulage costs rose 18% while fleet utilisation fell — the operating model, not the fleet size, is the constraint.
fields.guidance: 1–2 sentence statement of the client's problem.

fields.name: pain_points
fields.example: Cycle times vary 2.3x between shifts for the same route

fields.name: approach_summary
fields.example: A three-phase engagement: baseline the operation, simulate the options, land the change.
fields.guidance: One sentence on the shape of the work.

fields.name: approach_steps
fields.example: Phase 1 (Weeks 1–3): data audit and baseline model
fields.guidance: One bullet per phase: name (timing) — what happens.

fields.name: scope_items
fields.example: Validated simulation model of the current operation
fields.guidance: What's in scope, one deliverable per bullet.

fields.name: team_members
fields.example: Jane Mokoena — Engagement Lead — simulation & mining ops
fields.guidance: One bullet per person: Name — Role — relevant expertise.

fields.name: investment_summary
fields.example: Eight weeks, three consultants, fixed fee.
fields.guidance: One line: duration, team size, commercial model.

fields.name: investment_lines
fields.guidance: One bullet per phase or line item: phase — timing — fee.

fields.name: value_statement
fields.example: We've done this transition twelve times in mining — we start with the answer's shape, not a blank page

fields.name: value_points
fields.example: Twelve comparable engagements in the last five years

slide_groups.name: topic_slides
slide_groups.purpose: Extra topic slides before the close (case studies, assumptions, risks, references) — one topic per slide. Omit for the standard proposal.

fields.name: topic_points
fields.example: Similar scope delivered for a tier-1 operator in 2025

slides.name: Context & challenge
slides.purpose: Problem statement + evidence of the pain.

slides.name: Approach
slides.purpose: Shape of the work + one bullet per phase.

slides.name: Scope & deliverables
slides.purpose: What's in scope, one per bullet.

slides.name: Timeline & investment
slides.purpose: Duration, team size, fee per phase.

slides.name: Extra topic
slides.purpose: Optional additional topics, one per slide.
